svg.title: DebugDuel system architecture
svg.desc: Architecture showing frontend, backend, database, AI judge, and real-time socket layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What screens does Player A see in DebugDuel?')
sendPrompt('What does Player B see in the duel arena?')
sendPrompt('What pages are in the Next.js frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does the Socket.io room system work in DebugDuel?')
sendPrompt('How does the FOMO signal system work?')
sendPrompt('What are the main API routes in DebugDuel?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI judge work in DebugDuel?')
sendPrompt('How does the ELO and token calculation work?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the DebugDuel database?')
sendPrompt('How are bugs generated and stored?')
sendPrompt('How does Clerk handle auth in DebugDuel?')
